summary: V5.1 Guaranteed-Only Declarative Phase testing complete. All 24 unit tests pass (Tests 1-11 V5, Tests 12-17 V5.1). All 5 API endpoints return 200. No runtime errors after backend restart.

minor.issue: bcrypt passlib warning on startup (non-blocking, known compatibility issue)

critical_code_review_comments: V5.1 implementation is correct: initialize_declarative_phase filters to accepted_guaranteed only
Non-guaranteed participants auto-resolved to waived with decision_source='non_guaranteed_auto_waived'
If < 2 guaranteed participants remain, phase = not_needed (correct threshold)
Auto-waived participants excluded from sheet creators (line 134-137)
All 6 new V5.1 tests (12-17) verify the guaranteed-only filtering logic
context_for_next_testing_agent: V5.1 Guaranteed-Only Declarative Phase fully tested. Unit tests cover all 24 scenarios (V5 Tests 1-11, V5.1 Tests 12-17). API endpoints verified: /api/health, /api/auth/login, /api/attendance-sheets/pending, /api/disputes/mine, /api/notifications/counts. No regressions found.

coverage: Test 1: Small group - all unknown + no neg tech → waived
Test 2: Small group - all unknown + neg tech → dispute
Test 3: Small group - unanimous present → on_time
Test 4: Small group - contradictory declarations → dispute
Test 4b: Small group - unanimous absent → dispute
Test 5: Large group - 0 expressed + no neg tech → waived
Test 6: Large group - 1 positive + no neg tech → waived
Test 7: Large group - 1 absent → dispute
Test 8: Large group - >=2 unanimous present → on_time
Test 9: Large group - >=2 unanimous absent → existing logic
Test 9b: Large group - >=2 unanimous absent + contradiction → dispute
Test 10: Large group - disagreement → dispute
Test 11: Auto-litige guard - target == organizer → waived, no dispute
_check_unanimity: zero expressed
_check_unanimity: single expressed

_check_unanimity: two disagreement

Test 13: Mix guaranteed/non-guaranteed → non-guaranteed waived
Test 14: 1 guaranteed + 2 non-guaranteed → not_needed
Test 15: 0 guaranteed → all waived, not_needed
Test 16: Auto-waived fields correct
Test 17: Non-guaranteed excluded from sheets
